name: KAPE TECHNOLOG.PLC DL-,01
summary: KAPE TECHNOLOG.PLC DL-,01: Kape Technologies PLC, formerly Crossrider, is a digital security and privacy software provider. The company develops and distributes a range of security software products, including VPNs and antivirus solutions, focusing on consumer privacy. Kape Technologies is headquartered in London, UK.
